name: Lifetimely Ecommerce LTV Analytics API
what_it_does: Ecommerce lifetime value (LTV) analytics platform with API — calculating customer lifetime value, cohort analysis, contribution margin by channel, product-level profitability, and predictive LTV modeling for Shopify and WooCommerce brands to optimize acquisition spend and retention.
use_cases: Querying customer lifetime value predictions by acquisition channel for CAC optimization
Pulling cohort retention and LTV curves for subscription and repeat purchase analysis
Integrating contribution margin data with ad spend dashboards for blended ROAS
Analyzing product-level profitability including COGS and ad attribution
Automating monthly LTV reports for DTC brand investors and leadership
not_for: B2B SaaS revenue analytics (Lifetimely is ecommerce-focused)
Real-time order management and fulfillment (use Shopify API directly)
Marketing attribution without ecommerce transaction data
best_when: A DTC ecommerce brand on Shopify or WooCommerce wants deep LTV analytics, contribution margin accounting, and predictive LTV by channel to make data-driven acquisition and retention decisions.
avoid_when: You're not running ecommerce on Shopify/WooCommerce, need general-purpose analytics, or want full attribution modeling rather than LTV-focused metrics.

auth.notes: API key from Lifetimely account settings. Bearer token auth. Shop-scoped access. No webhooks. Shopify OAuth required for order and customer data. WooCommerce API key for WooCommerce stores. Data sync is scheduled — not real-time.

pricing.notes: Finnish company (Helsinki). Founded 2018. Bootstrapped. Shopify App Store native listing. LTV-first differentiator vs blended ROAS tools. Contribution margin accounting with COGS input. Predictive LTV with customer scoring. Cohort analysis by acquisition month and channel. Popular with Shopify Plus brands.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for LTV metrics, cohorts, and customer analytics. Bearer token auth. Limited API documentation. Shopify OAuth required for data. LTV calculations are computed analytics — may have latency after new data ingestion. COGS data requires manual input or integration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All analytics reads are fully idempotent. LTV reads idempotent by period and segment. Cohort reads idempotent by cohort month.
known_agent_gotchas: Shopify OAuth required — no standalone access without Shopify store
LTV predictions require 6+ months of order history for statistical validity
COGS input required for contribution margin accuracy — not pulled from Shopify automatically
Data sync latency — analytics updated on schedule, not real-time
Predictive LTV is ML-estimated — communicate confidence intervals in reporting

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Customer purchase history is PII — implement GDPR-compliant data retention. Shopify OAuth requires least-privilege scope for order and customer data. Finnish company with EU data protection standards.
